---
title: "Sam Lance"
image: media/headshot.jpeg
2toc: false
about:
  template: broadside
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sam-lance-898a5221a/
    - icon: square-github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/slance99
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:slance@ucsb.edu
---

**Introduction**

I am a first year PhD student in the Geography Department at UCSB working in the Surface Processes Laboratory under Vamsi Ganti.

**Professional and Academic Interests**

Geomorphology \| Flood Resilience \| Sustainable Water Resource Management \| Environmental Justice \| Sustainability \| Data Visualization

**Skills**

Python \| RStudio \| Affinity \| ArcGIS Pro \| Comfortable Navigating in Linux Environments
